postmark.Subject: Corporate refinance — Webb Holdings Ltd.
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Corporate refi for Webb Holdings Ltd. on investment property at 52 Winston Churchill Boulevard, Mississauga, ON L5M 4Y1.

Borrower: Webb Holdings Ltd. (Alberta holding co; Marcus Webb sole director + 100% beneficial owner).
Property value $1,850,000.
Existing 1st mortgage Royal Bank of Canada, balance $890,000.
New loan amount: $1,100,000.
LTV: 59%.

Corporate Articles + Director Resolution authorizing mortgage attached separately on signing. AML/PEP applies to Marcus as ultimate beneficial owner.

Jonathan Ferrara
Ferrara Financial
Lic. #M16002271
